aws.ec2.networkacl_allow_ingress_any_por.expert_reasoning: Network ACL unrestricted ingress check can cover this

aws.ec2.securitygroup_allow_ingress_from.expert_reasoning: AI: 0.0.0.0 = internet. Rule checks NO internet access, compliance wants to detect ALLOW internet
aws.ec2.securitygroup_allow_ingress_from.implementation_note: If rule PASSES (no 0.0.0.0), then compliance FAILS (internet not allowed)

aws.ec2.securitygroup_allow_ingress_from.expert_reasoning: AI: Same rule can detect SSH from internet - inverse logic
aws.ec2.securitygroup_allow_ingress_from.implementation_note: If rule PASSES, SSH from internet is blocked (good)
